headline.purpose: Page title only. Appears once. Rendered in Ember Gold.

title.purpose: Act section headers. Most prominent repeated typographic element.

body.purpose: Area names (600 weight), pickup item names, notes, act-level text. Primary reading copy.

label.purpose: Column headers, section eyebrows. Uppercase, wide tracking. The only uppercase text in the system.

mono.purpose: Level badge numerals, regex code-boxes, copyable technical strings.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Color transitions on buttons, borders, text.

breakpoints.name: max
breakpoints.purpose: Main content max-width. Centered beyond this.

components.name: Ghost Button (Chrome)
components.description: Header-level actions like Copy Markdown and Reset. Quiet at rest, confirms on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; border: 1px solid oklch(20% 0.007 55); color: oklch(44% 0.006 60); font-size: 0.8125rem; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; padding: 0.28rem 0.6rem; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; transition: border-color 130ms, color 130ms; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: oklch(26% 0.008 55); color: oklch(66% 0.008 70); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 1px solid oklch(54% 0.100 65); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button (Danger)
components.description: Destructive variant of the ghost button. Danger state is hover-only — never shown at rest.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; border: 1px solid oklch(20% 0.007 55); color: oklch(44% 0.006 60); font-size: 0.8125rem; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; padding: 0.28rem 0.6rem; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; transition: border-color 130ms, color 130ms; } .ds-btn-ghost--danger:hover { border-color: oklch(64% 0.200 25); color: oklch(64% 0.200 25); } .ds-btn-ghost--danger:focus-visible { outline: 1px solid oklch(64% 0.200 25); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Act Button
components.description: Contextual actions inside an act header (e.g. Add note, collapse all areas). Ember-tinted at rest, reveals gold on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-act { background: transparent; border: 1px solid oklch(54% 0.100 65 / 0.25); color: oklch(54% 0.100 65); font-size: 0.6875rem; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; padding: 0.2rem 0.48rem; border-radius: 3px; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; transition: border-color 130ms, color 130ms, background 130ms; } .ds-btn-act:hover { border-color: oklch(54% 0.100 65); color: oklch(76% 0.158 65); background: oklch(76% 0.158 65 / 0.10); } .ds-btn-act:focus-visible { outline: 1px solid oklch(54% 0.100 65); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Skip Toggle
components.description: 22×22 icon button in each pickup table row. Strikethrough icon at rest; X icon on hover and when skipped. State persists.
components.html: <button class="ds-skip-btn" aria-label="Skip pickup" aria-pressed="false"><svg class="ds-icon-strike" width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 12 12" fill="none"><line x1="2" y1="6" x2="10" y2="6" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg><svg class="ds-icon-x" width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 12 12" fill="none" style="display:none"><line x1="3" y1="3" x2="9" y2="9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="9" y1="3" x2="3" y2="9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-skip-btn { background: none; border: 1px solid oklch(20% 0.007 55); border-radius: 3px; width: 22px; height: 22px; padding: 0; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: oklch(36% 0.005 55); transition: border-color 130ms, color 130ms; } .ds-skip-btn:hover { border-color: oklch(54% 0.100 65); color: oklch(54% 0.100 65); } .ds-skip-btn:hover .ds-icon-strike { display: none; } .ds-skip-btn:hover .ds-icon-x { display: block !important; } .ds-skip-btn[aria-pressed=true] { } .ds-skip-btn[aria-pressed=true] .ds-icon-strike { display: none; } .ds-skip-btn[aria-pressed=true] .ds-icon-x { display: block !important; color: oklch(54% 0.100 65); } .ds-skip-btn:focus-visible { outline: 1px solid oklch(54% 0.100 65); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Badge (Ember)
components.description: Level recommendation badge. Mono font, amber tint. Non-interactive.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 2px; padding: 0.07rem 0.38rem; border-radius: 3px; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 700; white-space: nowrap; letter-spacing: 0.02em; } .ds-badge--amber { background: oklch(76% 0.158 65 / 0.10); border: 1px solid oklch(54% 0.100 65 / 0.25); color: oklch(54% 0.100 65); } .ds-badge-num { font-family: 'SF Mono', 'Fira Code', ui-monospace, monospace; }

components.name: Badge (Signal Green)
components.description: Quest-reward type badge. Non-interactive. Signal Green only.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.1rem 0.38rem; border-radius: 3px; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-badge--green { background: oklch(21% 0.042 148); border: 1px solid oklch(33% 0.070 148); color: oklch(70% 0.130 148); }

components.name: Badge (Signal Blue)
components.description: Passive-reward type badge. Non-interactive. Signal Blue only.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.1rem 0.38rem; border-radius: 3px; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-badge--blue { background: oklch(20% 0.048 258); border: 1px solid oklch(30% 0.072 258); color: oklch(70% 0.110 258); }

components.name: Act Section Header
components.description: Collapsible act container header. Amber title, chevron toggle, contextual action buttons. The typographic peak of each page section.
components.css: .ds-act-header { display: flex; align-items: stretch; background: oklch(15% 0.018 62); } .ds-act-toggle { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 12px 16px; flex: 1; min-width: 0; background: transparent; border: none; cursor: pointer; text-align: left; color: oklch(76% 0.158 65); font-size: 1.0625rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.01em; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; transition: background 120ms; user-select: none; } .ds-act-toggle:hover { background: oklch(17.5% 0.022 62); } .ds-chevron { flex-shrink: 0; width: 13px; height: 13px; color: inherit; opacity: 0.7; transition: transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-act-header--collapsed .ds-chevron { transform: rotate(-90deg); } .ds-act-btns { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 0 12px; border-left: 1px solid oklch(54% 0.100 65 / 0.25); } .ds-btn-act { background: transparent; border: 1px solid oklch(54% 0.100 65 / 0.25); color: oklch(54% 0.100 65); font-size: 0.6875rem; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; padding: 0.2rem 0.48rem; border-radius: 3px; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; transition: border-color 130ms, color 130ms, background 130ms; } .ds-btn-act:hover { border-color: oklch(54% 0.100 65); color: oklch(76% 0.158 65); background: oklch(76% 0.158 65 / 0.10); }

narrative.overview:
This is a dense field guide rendered on-screen — the kind of annotated map a veteran player would hand you before a run, confident and warm without being flashy. Every interface decision starts from that image: trusted, legible, purposeful. The surface is as dark as charcoal paper, the accent is the color of a lantern through a tent wall. Information fills the space because the journey is complex, not because the interface failed to edit itself.

The system is restrained by design. One accent — Ember Gold — does all the emotional lifting: act headers, interactive affordances, level badges, hover states. Everything else is a discipline of near-blacks and warm grays that recede behind the content.

What this system explicitly rejects: atmospheric overload (textured fantasy backgrounds, glow halos, particle effects), generic SaaS patterns, the MediaWiki wall-of-text aesthetic, and the mid-gray Discord-clone dark theme.
keyCharacteristics: Tonal layering, not shadows — depth through OKLCH lightness steps, no box-shadows
One accent (Ember Gold), used sparingly — act headers, badges, and interactive elements only
Major second type scale (~1.125 ratio) — compact without feeling small
4pt base spacing — disciplined rhythm, not generous whitespace
System font stack — no web font loading, no latency, no FOIT
All colors in OKLCH with warm-brown hue bias (h≈55-75); neutrals are never truly gray

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Ember Gold is the only accent. Signal Green and Signal Blue are semantic only, confined to pickup-type badges. Never add a second decorative accent. If Ember Gold does not solve it, solve it with lightness contrast instead.

rules.name: The Warm Neutral Rule
rules.body: Every neutral — including the darkest background — carries hue h≈55 with chroma ≥0.004. Pure grays are prohibited. The warmth should be felt, not named.

rules.name: The Amber Type Rule
rules.body: Ember Gold appears on type only at the Headline and Title levels (act headers, page title). Body copy in amber is prohibited — it would dilute the accent's signal. If an item needs to be highlighted, use a badge rather than coloring the text.

rules.name: The No-Display Rule
rules.body: There is no display or hero font. The first typographic element the eye lands on is an act header — 17px, 700 weight, amber. That is the maximum. Nothing should feel editorial or expressive.

rules.name: The Shadow-Free Rule
rules.body: No box-shadow. No drop-shadow. No filter: blur() used decoratively. If a new component needs to feel above the surface, raise its OKLCH lightness by 2-4% and add border: 1px solid {colors.border}. That is the only permitted elevation gesture.

dos: Do use OKLCH for all color declarations. Every neutral carries h≈55 and chroma ≥0.004.
Do confine Ember Gold to act headers, level badges, and interactive hover reveals.
Do use tonal layering for depth — raise lightness by 2-4% and add a 1px border. Never add box-shadow.
Do keep the type scale tight. The five steps (11px → 13px → 15px → 17px → 19px) cover every case.
Do use the Label style (0.6875rem, 700, uppercase, ls 0.09em) for all section eyebrows and table column headers.
Do treat Signal Green and Signal Blue as badge-only semantic tokens.
Do ensure all interactive elements have visible :focus-visible treatment — a 1px amber-dim outline offset by 2px.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion — set all transition durations to 0ms when the media query matches.
donts: Don't add atmospheric overload: no textured backgrounds, glow halos around icons, ambient particle effects.
Don't use generic SaaS patterns: no white or light-mode backgrounds, no gradient cards, no metric dashboards.
Don't create a wiki dump: no unstructured walls of text, no tables without typographic hierarchy.
Don't use a Discord-clone dark theme: no mid-gray surfaces, no saturated purple or blue accent colors.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Emphasis is weight or size.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't add a second decorative accent color. Ember Gold is singular.
Don't add shadows. The design tests clean if no box-shadow keyword appears anywhere.
Don't use pure grays. Minimum chroma is 0.004 on all neutrals.
Don't animate layout properties. Collapse is display: none; transitions use opacity and transform only.
